messages.content:
I can research **Section 201** from these angles. Please select the one that best fits your needs:

1. Section 201 of the Indian Penal Code (IPC) — Legal provisions and punishments for causing disappearance of evidence
2. Section 201 of the Code of Criminal Procedure (CrPC) — Procedures and implications related to the suppression of evidence
3. Section 201 of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) — Comparative analysis with IPC Section 201 post-July 2024
4. Judicial interpretations and landmark judgments on Section 201 — Supreme Court and High Court rulings

research_directions: Section 201 of the Indian Penal Code (IPC) — Legal provisions and punishments for causing disappearance of evidence
Section 201 of the Code of Criminal Procedure (CrPC) — Procedures and implications related to the suppression of evidence
Section 201 of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) — Comparative analysis with IPC Section 201 post-July 2024
Judicial interpretations and landmark judgments on Section 201 — Supreme Court and High Court rulings

messages.content: Section 201 of the Code of Criminal Procedure (CrPC) — Procedures and implications related to the suppression of evidence

I can research **Section 201 of the Code of Criminal Procedure (CrPC)** from these focused angles. Please select the one that best fits your needs:

1. Section 201 of the Code of Criminal Procedure (CrPC) — Detailed analysis of procedures for suppression of evidence under Section 201, including filing, inquiry, and judicial scrutiny
2. Section 201 CrPC in conjunction with the Indian Evidence Act — Legal implications of suppressed evidence on trial proceedings and burden of proof
3. Landmark judgments on Section 201 CrPC — Supreme Court and High Court interpretations of procedural safeguards and constitutional validity
4. Comparative analysis: Section 201 CrPC vs. Section 201 IPC — Distinguishing suppression of evidence (CrPC) from causing disappearance of evidence (IPC)
